# JKKN College of Pharmacy

> JKKN College of Pharmacy is a PCI-approved, NAAC A Grade pharmacy institution in Komarapalayam, Tamil Nadu, India. Established in 1985, it is part of JKKN Institutions — a multi-disciplinary educational group with 74+ years of excellence.

## Institution Overview

- Name: JKKN College of Pharmacy
- Alternate Name: JKKN Pharmacy College
- Founded: 1985
- Website: https://pharmacy.jkkn.ac.in
- Parent Organization: JKKN Institutions (https://jkkn.ac.in)
- Campus: Natarajapuram, NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore Highway), Komarapalayam, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu 638183, India
- Phone: +91 9345855001
- Email: pharmacy@jkkn.ac.in

## Approvals & Accreditations

- Pharmacy Council of India (PCI) — Approved
- All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) — Approved
- National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) — A Grade
- Affiliated to The Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai

## Programmes Offered

### B.Pharm (Bachelor of Pharmacy)
- Duration: 4 years (8 semesters)
- Intake: 100 seats
- Eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology (50% minimum)
- Affiliation: The Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University

### M.Pharm (Master of Pharmacy)
- Duration: 2 years (4 semesters)
- Specialisations: Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmacy Practice
- Intake: 9-15 seats per specialisation
- Eligibility: B.Pharm with 55% marks, GPAT preferred

### Pharm.D (Doctor of Pharmacy)
- Duration: 6 years (5 years academic + 1 year internship)
- Intake: 30 seats
- Eligibility: 10+2 with PCM/PCB (50% minimum)
- Focus: Clinical pharmacy, patient care, pharmaceutical care services

### Ph.D (Doctor of Philosophy in Pharmaceutical Sciences)
- Research programme in pharmaceutical sciences

## Placement Highlights

- Placement Rate: 85%+ consistently
- Top Recruiters: Sun Pharma, Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin, Aurobindo, Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus, Hetero
- Average Package: 3-4 LPA
- Highest Package: 6-8 LPA
- Career Paths: Pharmaceutical manufacturing, quality control, R&D, clinical research, hospital pharmacy, community pharmacy, drug regulatory affairs, pharmacovigilance

## Campus Facilities

- State-of-the-art pharmaceutical laboratories
- Digital library with journal access
- 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital (clinical exposure)
- Separate hostels for boys and girls
- Transport services covering Salem, Erode, Namakkal, Coimbatore routes
- WiFi-enabled campus
- Sports facilities and gymnasium
- Seminar halls and smart classrooms
- Drug Information Centre
- Animal House for pharmacological research

## Location & Accessibility

- Nearest Cities: Namakkal (10 km), Erode (35 km), Salem (45 km), Coimbatore (105 km), Tiruppur (85 km)
- Highway: Located on NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore National Highway) — excellent road connectivity
- Nearest Railway Stations: Salem Junction (45 km), Erode Junction (35 km)
- Nearest Airport: Coimbatore International Airport (105 km)

## AI Crawler Permissions

This site welcomes AI crawlers. See robots.txt for full details.
Permitted crawlers include: GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended, Anthropic, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Applebot-Extended, Meta-ExternalAgent, Bytespider, and others.
